landAreaDisplay: Three Hundred (300) square meters, more or less
purpose: Construction of the Fire Station building
conditions: The donated land is intended for the Fire Station building.
If the donee no longer uses the area for the Fire Station building, the donated area shall revert to the donor or the Municipality of Asingan.
